description: C++ new[]/delete[] lifecycle: leak and double delete patterns

expected.notes: new char[1024] at line 4 never deleted — detected via new/delete resource pair
delete[] called twice — detected via new/delete resource pair
strcpy(buf, "hello") in leak() — dangerous unbounded copy, AST pattern correctly flags it.
strcpy(buf, "hello") in clean() — dangerous unbounded copy, AST pattern correctly flags it.
